user.title: Schedule Wizard
user.description: Add the Schedule Wizard integration. After it is created, open Configure to set the calendar and defaults.

init.title: Schedule Wizard options
init.description: Calendar entity to poll, polling interval, lookahead window, and default run duration.

run_valve.name: Run valve
run_valve.description: Open a valve for a given duration.

stop_valve.name: Stop valve
stop_valve.description: Close a valve and cancel any auto-close timer.

add_valve.name: Add valve
add_valve.description: Register a valve with the scheduler.

remove_valve.name: Remove valve
remove_valve.description: Unregister a valve and delete its schedules.

add_schedule.name: Add schedule
add_schedule.description: Add a recurring schedule for a registered valve or cycle.

update_schedule.name: Update schedule
update_schedule.description: Patch an existing schedule by id.

add_cycle.name: Add cycle
add_cycle.description: Create a cycle that runs a list of valves sequentially.

remove_cycle.name: Remove cycle
remove_cycle.description: Delete a cycle and any linked schedules.

run_cycle.name: Run cycle
run_cycle.description: Start a cycle now; valves run sequentially.

list_config.name: List config
list_config.description: Returns valves, schedules, cycles, active runs, active cycles, and recent history.
